page_metadata.biotools__summary: A software to aid the identification of regions of Identity By Descent (IBD) in inbred families, by visually presenting colour-coded SNP genotype data ordered by physical or genetic distance.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A software to aid the identification of regions of Identity By Descent (IBD) in inbred families, by visually presenting colour-coded SNP genotype data ordered by physical or genetic distance.
